name: google-maps-scraper
description: Scrape business data from Google Maps including names, addresses, websites, phone numbers, ratings, and reviews

commands.description: Scrape Google Maps for business data

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install dependencies: pip install playwright pandas && playwright install chromium

args.name: query
args.description: Search query for Google Maps (e.g., 'restaurants in Paris')

args.name: limit
args.description: Maximum number of results to scrape (default: 10)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: Install dependencies: pip install playwright pandas && playwright install chromium
